data.title: FPT AI Factory Accelerates AI Reasoning Capabilities across Southeast Asia and Japan with NVIDIA
data.description: In HANOI, Vietnam, FPT AI Factory revealed the development of its advanced AI infrastructure with the help of NVIDIA HGX B300 systems. This move signifies a crucial advancement in supporting AI developers and businesses to drive AI innovation throughout the region, leveraging reasoning and agentic capabilities. The evolution of AI into a new stage emphasizes the importance of integrating it extensively into various sectors. The increasing potency of models and the pace of adoption highlight the potential for AI to redefine industries.

data.title: Natural Grocers® Invites Abilene, TX Community to Celebrate Grand Reopening on April 9, 2026
data.description: Starting from April 9 to April 30, customers at the new location in LAKEWOOD, Colo., can expect significant discounts, as well as opportunities for giveaways, sweepstakes, samples, and more. Natural Grocers®, a prominent family-operated organic and natural grocery store in the United States, is excited to offer these savings and experiences to its customers.

data.title: Argan Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Argan, Inc. (NYSE: AGX) is set to reveal its fourth-quarter earnings after the market closes on Thursday, March 26. Analysts are predicting that the Arlington, Virginia-headquartered company will announce quarterly earnings of $1.98 per share, a decrease from $2.22 per share in the same quarter last year. The consensus among analysts for Argan's quarterly revenue stands at $255.32 million, an increase from the previous year's reported revenue of $232.47 million. In its third-quarter report released on December 4, Argan disclosed mixed results. The company's shares experienced a 1.7% drop, closing at $437.48 on Wednesday. For more detailed information and the latest analyst ratings on Argan, interested individuals can refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga, where they can organize information by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and other criteria.

data.title: Bitcoin price drops below $70K as Pentagon plans potential action against Iran after Trump's temporary halt on strikes.
data.description: Analysts have observed that the support level of Bitcoin may be at risk due to the impending expiration of Trump's temporary halt on strikes targeting Iran's energy facilities. The five-day pause initiated by Trump is drawing attention as investors monitor its conclusion, which could potentially impact Bitcoin's performance. This development has raised concerns among market participants, with Bitcoin's stability being closely scrutinized in the face of geopolitical events. Traders are closely watching for any fluctuations in Bitcoin's value as the deadline looms.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From McCormick Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE: MKC) is set to unveil its first-quarter earnings on Tuesday, March 31. The spice and condiment company is also interested in acquiring Unilever's food business, generating buzz among investors. McCormick currently boasts an annual dividend yield of 3.64%, equivalent to a quarterly dividend of 48 cents per share ($1.92 annually). Investors looking to leverage this dividend yield for a steady $500 monthly income would require an investment of about $164,938 or approximately 3,125 shares. A more conservative $100 monthly income would necessitate an investment of $32,988 or around 625 shares. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: After More Than a Decade of Fan Demand, Taco Bell® Finally Brings Diablo Sauce to Canada
data.description: In Vaughan, Ontario, Taco Bell Canada is granting the wishes of Canadian fans by introducing their iconic Diablo sauce at restaurants this spring. The sauce, which launched in the U.S. in 2015, will be available for the first time for a limited period at select Taco Bell locations across Canada. Over a decade of anticipation from fans has led to this long-awaited moment, with numerous requests made on Taco Bell's social platforms and various online communities for the sauce to be brought to Canada. This news has sparked excitement among Taco Bell enthusiasts nationwide.

data.title: Advyzon Named Best All-In-One Software Solution for 9th Consecutive Year in 2026 Advisor Software Survey from T3 and Inside Information
data.description: In Chicago, Advyzon, a tech platform for financial advisors, stood out in the 2026 T3/Inside Information Software Survey, known in wealthtech. Known for its portfolio management, it received top client satisfaction scores. Advyzon was seen as a "Software All-Star," excelling in various advisor tech areas. This recognition solidifies its position as a leader in the industry, showcasing consistent excellence in core technology for advisors.
Earnings Scheduled For March 26, 2026

data.title: Viking Therapeutics Announces Completion of Enrollment in Phase 3 VANQUISH-2 Trial of VK2735
data.description: A clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, Viking Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: VKTX), based in San Diego, conducted a 78-week study on subcutaneous VK2735 in adults with obesity and Type 2 diabetes. The study aimed to evaluate the effectiveness of the drug in this patient population. The results of this study, which lasted over a year, will provide valuable insights into the potential benefits of VK2735 for individuals dealing with both conditions. Stay tuned for further updates on this research.

data.title: Another Month, Another Milestone: Bybit Earn's Mantle Vault More than Doubles AUM in First Quarter of 2026
data.description: On March 26, 2026 in Dubai, UAE, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, made a significant announcement regarding Mantle Vault on Bybit On-Chain Earn. This innovative product, developed in collaboration with a strategic partner, achieved a major milestone.

data.title: Biozen Named Finalist in ACC 2026 Innovation Pitch Challenge
data.description: Biozen, LLC has secured a spot as one of the four companies chosen to present at the prestigious American College of Cardiology Scientific Sessions in New Orleans. The event is set to take place in Oklahoma City on March 26, 2026. This selection comes as part of the ACC Future Hub Innovation Pitch Challenge, highlighting innovative companies in the field. Biozen, LLC will be competing against three other finalists for the top spot, showcasing their groundbreaking ideas to a prominent audience.

data.title: Audited Financial Results for the Twelve Months Ending December 31, 2025
data.description: Toronto-based Rupert Resources Ltd (TSX: RUP, OTCQX: RUPRF, FSE:R05) has released its audited financial results for the twelve months ending December 31, 2025. The company's Management’s Discussion and Analysis for the same period are also now available. Interested parties can access these documents on Rupert's website, www.rupertresources.com, and on its profile on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca. The financial information includes details on the company's performance and financial standing throughout the year.

data.title: Visa Launches Enhanced Subscription Manager, Giving Consumers Greater Control Over Recurring Payments
data.description: In San Francisco, Visa announced the launch of their Enhanced Subscription Manager solution as part of their Digital Issuer Solutions business. This service aims to meet the growing demand for easier management of recurring charges, with global subscriptions projected to hit 12 billion by 2030. Visa is partnering with Pinwheel, a top provider of in-app bill management tools, to enhance this offering. Visa, known as V on the NYSE, is a major player in digital payments technology.

data.title: Cognitiv Declares the End of Static Audience Segments with the Launch of AudienceGPT
data.description: In New York, the advanced performance partner Cognitiv unveiled AudienceGPT™, an AI-powered tool for marketers to pinpoint audiences based on real-time consumer journeys. This expansion of its platform represents a significant step forward, as AudienceGPT™ utilizes deep learning to move beyond traditional audience targeting methods. By analyzing behavioral cues, the tool can determine not only past actions but also predict future actions of consumers. This innovation aims to provide marketers with more dynamic and predictive insights, enhancing their targeting strategies.

data.title: Zentro Internet Closes Inaugural $240 Million ABS
data.description: In Chicago, Zentro Internet has successfully completed its first asset-backed securitization (ABS) financing, raising an impressive $240 million. This marks the largest ABS financing in the multifamily sector.

data.title: Upbound Group, Inc. Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.39 for the Second Quarter of 2026
data.description: Today, Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD) based in Plano, Texas, a company focused on providing inclusive financial solutions for underserved consumers, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.39 for the second quarter of 2026. The dividend payout date is scheduled for April 28, 2026. Shareholders of Upbound common stock as of the market close on the specified date will be eligible to receive this dividend.

data.title: Catalyst Acoustics Group Announces Catalyst Connect 2026, Bringing Together Industry Leaders in Acoustics and Design
data.description: An announcement has been made by Catalyst Acoustics Group, a leading company in acoustic, seismic, vibration, and noise control brands, regarding the return of Catalyst Connect. This one-day networking event aims to bring together industry professionals. The event is scheduled to take place on March 26, 2026, in Agawam, Massachusetts. Catalyst Acoustics Group serves as the parent company for a select group of brands in the acoustic, seismic, vibration, and noise control sectors. This event provides a platform for professionals to connect and collaborate.

data.title: TradFi-DeFi Convergence Accelerates as Real-World Asset Tokenization Gains Institutional Momentum
data.description: A recent collaboration between I-ON Digital, Instruxi, and RAAC demonstrates the evolving infrastructure connecting gold-backed assets, stablecoins, and on-chain liquidity markets. The partnership signifies the merging of traditional finance ("TradFi") and decentralized finance ("DeFi"). This development, announced in Chicago on March 26, 2026, highlights a significant trend in the financial industry where these sectors are blending to create new opportunities. The collaboration showcases the increasing interest in this merging space, with a particular focus on utilizing blockchain technology.

data.title: Cibus, Inc. Announces Pricing of Public Offering of Class A Common Stock
data.description: On March 26, 2026, agricultural technology firm Cibus, Inc. (Nasdaq: CBUS) revealed the pricing details for its underwritten public offering. The offering consists of 6,976,744 shares of its Class A Common Stock at a purchase price of $2.15 per share. Cibus is a leading company in developing and licensing plant traits to seed companies.

data.title: Modular Flooring Market worth $16.48 billion by 2031 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on March 26, 2026, it was reported that the Modular Flooring Market, as per MarketsandMarkets analysis, is segmented by Product Type (LVT, Ceramic, Rubber, Polyolefin), Installation Technique (Interlocking, Loose Lay), End-use (Household, Workplace, Healthcare, Education, Retail), and Region. Key figures and trends from the report indicate significant growth potential in the modular flooring sector, with a focus on various product types and installation techniques suitable for different end-use applications across regions.
